name: Connecticut Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Connecticut - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: How much does Connecticut CNA endorsement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The endorsement application fee is $55. Additional costs may include background check fees.
Yes, a fingerprint-based background check is required in Connecticut.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to Connecticut?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Connecticut while waiting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.
